metadata.title: Davi Peterson - Software Developer
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Davi Peterson, a software developer focused on Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, and PHP.

hero.title: Hi, I'm
hero.subtitle: Software developer passionate about building well-crafted digital products that feel good to use.
hero.mailBody: Hi Davi! I saw your portfolio and would like to talk.

paragraphs.first: Junior Software Developer with 2 years of experience in the JavaScript and TypeScript ecosystem. I enjoy building web applications that are fast, well thought out, and pleasant to use day to day.
paragraphs.second: I am currently studying Systems Analysis and Development at UniNorte and have been working on projects such as CRMs, landing pages, and web platforms, always paying attention to code organization, maintainability, and product scalability. More recently, I have been deepening my studies in the Laravel ecosystem to strengthen my full stack foundation.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Development focused on fluidity, optimization, and a consistent experience.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Interfaces built to be more inclusive and easier to use.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: Code designed for maintenance, product evolution, and teamwork.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Experience with pull requests, clear communication, and alignment between code and business goals.

docs.ReactJS: Library for building interfaces with components.
docs.Vue.js: Progressive framework for building reactive, component-based interfaces.

docs.Tailwind CSS: Utility-first CSS framework for building interfaces quickly.
docs.Jest: JavaScript testing framework with mocks and assertions.
docs.PHP: Scripting language for server-side web applications.
docs.Laravel: PHP framework focused on productivity and developer experience.
docs.Inertia.js: Bridge between backend and frontend for building SPAs without giving up the server.
docs.Eloquent: Laravel ORM for expressive data modeling and database queries.
docs.Pest: PHP testing framework with a fluent, readable syntax.
docs.Docker: Container platform for packaging and shipping applications.
docs.Prisma ORM: ORM for TypeScript and Node with schema and migrations.
docs.Redis: In-memory database used for cache, queues, and high performance.
docs.MySQL: Popular and widely used relational database.

dgComputer.title: Hardware Technician
dgComputer.description: Solid experience in technical support, hardware assembly and maintenance, network infrastructure, and systems.
achievements: Technical support for IT, including preventive and corrective equipment maintenance.
Assembly and configuration of computers (desktops and laptops) and networking devices such as switches and routers.
Installation of operating systems, drivers, and software with optimization and troubleshooting.

nxsSkill.title: Frontend Developer
nxsSkill.description: Frontend development for an education platform, with emphasis on accessibility, performance, and rich UI experiences. Collaboration on design system work and authentication flow improvements.
achievements: Worked on version 2.0 of the web platform in collaboration with a team of 6 developers.
Built complex responsive interfaces for authentication, registration flows, and dashboards using Next.js and TypeScript.
Implemented backend modules and API routes to support new platform features.

twoBrains.title: Junior Software Developer
twoBrains.description: Worked as a Junior Software Developer on modern digital products. Contributed to frontend work with Next.js and React, backend work with Node.js, bug fixing, and continuous technical growth. Also started learning AWS for serverless services, storage, APIs, and AI integrations when needed.
achievements: Full stack development with Next.js and Node.js for internal products and client projects.
Hands-on learning with AWS services such as serverless, storage, and APIs with team support.
Bug fixes and continuous improvements focused on quality and value delivery.

indicai.title: Software Developer (Contractor)
indicai.description: Worked as an independent contractor on full stack solutions and DevOps practices, with responsibilities aligned with junior-level work: feature implementation, bug fixing, API integration, and scalable code patterns. Participated in release cycles for the Play Store and App Store while continuously improving UX, UI, and performance.
achievements: Full stack and DevOps work focused on architecture definition and scalable coding standards.
Implemented high-fidelity interfaces with emphasis on UX, UI, accessibility, and performance.
Planned and executed release cycles, including launching the app on mobile stores.

uape.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
uape.description: Internship in full stack development focused on scalable architecture, service integration, and good coding practices. Also involved in AI and Data Science initiatives applied to internal products.
achievements: Built an entire payment management software used across 3 states.
Created landing pages with internationalization support in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.
Provided advanced technical support and environment setup for Windows and Linux/Ubuntu infrastructure.

aliceBlog.title: Alice Blog
aliceBlog.description: Open source blog built to study cache strategies in Next.js, authentication with admin and regular user profiles, post interactions with comments and likes, and reading time calculation. It also served as hands-on practice for PR-based collaboration and AI-assisted development with Specify.

nexusSkills.title: Nexus Skills
nexusSkills.description: Nexus Skill platform with courses designed to strengthen people's soft skills.

uape.title: UAPE
uape.description: Institutional landing page presenting UAPÉ's global health data engineering work: data sovereignty, fast deployment, offline-first mobile collection, health system integration, and real-time visualizations. Available in 3 languages (PT/EN/ES).

masterMindLanding.title: Master Mind – Landing Page
masterMindLanding.description: Landing page built to promote the Master Mind app, combining productivity and financial control integrated with Google Calendar.

masterControl.title: Master Control
masterControl.description: POS software used for managing sales and customers without depending on a base inventory.

jusFacil.title: Jus Fácil
jusFacil.description: Open source legal app for consulting and organizing legal summaries, built with Expo and React Native.

roboticaEducacional.title: Robótica Educacional
roboticaEducacional.description: Institutional website for an academic project migrated to React and TypeScript, presenting goals, team, STEAM methodology, and results.

contact.introDescription: I am always open to discussing new projects, creative opportunities, or interesting partnerships. Feel free to reach out.

form.title: Send a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Software developer passionate about creating well-built digital solutions and consistent user experiences.
footer.mailBody: Hi Davi! I saw your portfolio and would like to talk.
